chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No. D-514 of 2023 (Mushtaq Ahmed & others v. P.O Sindh & others) Present:- Mr. Justice Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro & Mr. Justice Arbab Ali Hakro Mr. Alam Sher Bozdar, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Nisar Ahmed Bhanbhro, Advocate for respondent No.6. Mr. Muhammad Zubair Malik, Advocate for respondents No.2&5. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant A.G – Sindh. Date of Hearing & Decision: 22-11-2023 O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO, J:- Petitioners are resident of taluka Kotdjii district Khairpur have filed this petition against shifting of Ever Shine Public High School Bozdar Wada being run by Sindh Education Foundation from its current place at Bozdar Wada to a place away from their villages. 2. Learned counsel for respondent No.6 submits that initially the school was being run in rented premises, which has been vacated at the instance of landlord and currently the school has been established at a different place, but it is in the same vicinity where children from surrounding villages are getting education. He has filed a statement showing in all 683 students, boys and girls, are getting education in this school without any difficulty. 3. Therefore, no case of indulgence under constitutional jurisdiction by this court is made out. Initially the school was being run in a rented premises which has been got vacated by the landlord, and this building where the school is being run, has been arranged by the respondents. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed along with pending application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
